revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Soviet_Union%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Soviet_Union%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{documentation subpage}}
<kbd>Country_data</kbd> templates are also available for each of the 15 [[republics of the Soviet Union]]:
{| style="background-color:#ecfcf4"
|-
| [[Template:Country data Armenian SSR]] || {{flag|Armenian SSR}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Azerbaijan SSR]] || {{flag|Azerbaijan SSR}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Byelorussian SSR]] || {{flag|Byelorussian SSR}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Estonian SSR]] || {{flag|Estonian SSR}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Georgian SSR]] || {{flag|Georgian SSR}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Kazakh SSR]] || {{flag|Kazakh SSR}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Kirghiz SSR]] || {{flag|Kirghiz SSR}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Latvian SSR]] || {{flag|Latvian SSR}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Lithuanian SSR]] || {{flag|Lithuanian SSR}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Moldavian SSR]] || {{flag|Moldavian SSR}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Russian SFSR]] || {{flag|Russian SFSR}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Tajik SSR]] || {{flag|Tajik SSR}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Turkmen SSR]] || {{flag|Turkmen SSR}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Ukrainian SSR]] || {{flag|Ukrainian SSR}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Uzbek SSR]] || {{flag|Uzbek SSR}}
|}<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Country data templates of former countries|Soviet Union]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
